key.name: layout-version
key.description: Version marker for the saved layout format.

key.name: panel-layout
key.description: Ordered entries in the form section:itemId for movable items across the left, center, and right panel sections, for example left:activities.

key.name: baseline-layout
key.description: The first safe movable-item layout detected while the extension is enabled.

key.name: available-items
key.description: Runtime-discovered panel items encoded as JSON strings.

key.name: sync-generation
key.description: Increment this value to ask the live extension to rescan panel items.

key.name: last-error
key.description: Most recent runtime error captured while applying the panel layout.
